ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number associated with the transaction */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was posted */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type (e.g., Debit, Credit) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID indicating the type of expense */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Merchant ID related to the merchant where the transaction occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for tracking the transaction */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is recurring */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the recurring transaction (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "next_recurring_date" TEXT /* Next date the recurring transaction will occur */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_number FOREIGN KEY ("account_number") REFERENCES accounts ("account_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the account holder */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Savings, Checking) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "iban" TEXT /* International Bank Account Number (IBAN) */,
  "swift_code" TEXT /* Society for Worldwide Interbank Financial Telecommunication (SWIFT) code */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Health & Medical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "merchant_city" TEXT /* City where the merchant is located */,
  "merchant_state" TEXT /* State where the merchant is located */,
  "merchant_type" TEXT /* Type of merchant (e.g., Retail, Service) */,
  "merchant_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the merchant belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Purchase, Refund) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the budget */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the budget */,
  "amount" REAL /* Budgeted amount for the category */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the budget period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the budget period */,
  "budget_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the budget (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., edited, deleted) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_histories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_histories_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose setting it is */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notifications, privacy) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., enabled, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_accounts" (
  "external_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the external account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the external account (e.g., credit card, bank account) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Number of the external account */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank where the external account is held */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the external account is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the link */,
  "internal_account_number" TEXT /* Number of the internal account */,
  "external_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external account */,
  "link_date" TEXT /* Date the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_links_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_links_internal_account_number FOREIGN KEY ("internal_account_number") REFERENCES accounts ("account_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_links_external_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_account_id") REFERENCES external_accounts ("external_account_id")
)
